# Captains Fish and Chicken
> Fresh fish, chicken & seafood — made to order in Cedar Rapids

## NAP
- Name: Captains Fish and Chicken
- Address: 1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids, IA 52402
- Phone: +1-319-221-1040
- Email: captainsfishchicken@gmail.com

## Hours
Mon–Thu 11am–10pm · Fri–Sat 11am–11pm · Sun 11am–8pm (please call to confirm)

## Domain
https://captains-fish-chicken.netlify.app

## Key Facts
- Cuisine: Seafood, Fried Chicken, Soul Food
- Price range: $$

## Menu
- Boneless Chicken Bites: Boneless Wings Meal (8 pcs) (Meal $12.99), Boneless Wings Meal (12 pcs) (Meal $18.99), Boneless Wings Only (20 pcs) (Only $26.99), Boneless Wings Only (30 pcs) (Only $49.99), Boneless Wings Only (50 pcs) (Only $79.99)

- Fish Only Family Deals: Catfish, Perch & Tilapia (10 pcs) (Family $49.99), Catfish, Perch & Tilapia (20 pcs) (Family $69.99), Catfish, Perch & Tilapia (30 pcs) (Family $99.99), Catfish, Perch & Tilapia (40 pcs) (Family $139.99), Catfish, Perch & Tilapia (50 pcs) (Family $166.99), Catfish Nuggets, Half Pan (Pan $49.99), Catfish Nuggets, Full Pan (Pan $89.99)

## Updated
2026-07-07

Facts-Json: https://captains-fish-chicken.netlify.app/facts.json

## Description
Captains Fish and Chicken serves fresh-to-order fried fish, chicken, wings, and seafood for takeout and delivery in Cedar Rapids, Iowa. Catfish, perch, tilapia, cod, red snapper, jumbo shrimp, whole and party wings, tenders, gizzards and livers, plus family fish deals and party pans for catering. Owner-operated by Ray Aqel on 1st Avenue NE since 2024.

## Owner
Ray Aqel

## Year Established
2024

## Q&A
### How many people does a family meal feed?
Our family meals and combos are portioned for a hungry household. A single family deal comfortably covers a family of four, and the three-item combo stretches further for larger groups. If you're feeding five or more, ask about our fish family deals when you call (319) 221-1040 and we'll help you size the order.

### How do I order family dinner for pickup?
The easiest way is to call (319) 221-1040 and order ahead. Since everything is fried fresh to order, calling gives the kitchen time to have your dinner hot and bagged when you arrive at 1616 1st Ave NE.

### Can I get family dinner delivered?
Yes. We deliver through DoorDash, Uber Eats, and Grubhub. Open your preferred app, search for Captains Fish and Chicken, and build your order. Delivery times and fees are set by each app.

### Do you have options for kids?
We do. Our kids meals are sized right for smaller appetites, so you can add one or two alongside the family deal and keep everyone at the table happy.

### Should I call ahead for a big family order?
Yes, please call ahead for larger orders. A quick call to (319) 221-1040 lets us prep everything fresh and have it ready at your pickup time instead of making you wait.

### What kinds of fish can I get for a fish fry?
We fry fresh catfish fillet, perch, tilapia, and cod. Each is dropped fresh to order for a crispy golden finish. If you want a mix for the table, a fish family deal lets you feed a group, and you can call (319) 221-1040 to talk through options.

### How many does a fish family deal feed for a fish fry?
The 10-piece fish family deal comfortably feeds a family of four to six as the main dish with sides. For larger gatherings, we offer bigger fish family deals up to a 50-piece. Call (319) 221-1040 and tell us your headcount.

### How do I order a fish fry for Friday pickup?
Call (319) 221-1040 and order ahead. Since we fry fresh to order, calling gives the kitchen time to have your fish hot and ready when you arrive at 1616 1st Ave NE, especially on a busy Friday evening.

### Can I get a fish fry delivered?
Yes. Order through DoorDash, Uber Eats, or Grubhub by searching Captains Fish and Chicken in the app. Each app sets its own delivery times and fees.

### Is the fish fry only on Fridays?
Not at all. We fry fresh fish every day, all year round, so you can enjoy a fish fry any day you like. Friday is just a favorite. Call (319) 221-1040 to confirm current hours before you head over.

### How many wings should I order for a watch party?
A good rule of thumb is 6 to 8 wings per person for a group that's making wings the main event, or 4 to 5 if you're also serving tenders and sides. For a crowd of eight to ten, ordering party wings plus a 10pc whole wings meal keeps everyone fed. Call (319) 221-1040 and we'll help you size it.

### How do I order wings for game day?
Call (319) 221-1040 and order ahead so we can time your wings to your kickoff. Everything is fried fresh to order, so a heads-up call means hot wings ready right when you need them at 1616 1st Ave NE.

### Can you deliver wings to my party?
Yes. We're on DoorDash, Uber Eats, and Grubhub. Search Captains Fish and Chicken in your app and order for delivery. Each app sets its own delivery times and fees.

### Do you have boneless options for the group?
We do. Our boneless chicken bites and chicken tenders are great for guests who'd rather skip the bone, and they round out a wing spread nicely.

### Should I call ahead for a large wing order?
Yes. For a big game-day order, calling (319) 221-1040 ahead of time lets the kitchen fry everything fresh and have it bagged hot at your pickup time instead of during the rush.

### How many people does a 50-piece fish family deal feed?
A 50-piece fish family deal generally serves around 15 to 20 people as a main dish, especially when paired with sides. For a smaller group of six to eight, the 10-piece fish family deal is a better fit. Call (319) 221-1040 and tell us your headcount and we'll recommend the right size.

### What should I order to cater an office lunch for 20?
For about 20 people, a 50-piece fish family deal plus a batch or two of party wings and a couple of large sides usually does it. If some of your group prefers chicken, add a three-item family combo. Call (319) 221-1040 and we'll build the order to your headcount.

### How far in advance should I call for catering?
For large catering orders, please call (319) 221-1040 as early as you can, at minimum several hours ahead and more for very big orders. Since everything is fried fresh to order, advance notice lets us prep it fresh and have it ready at your scheduled pickup time at 1616 1st Ave NE.

### How do I order catering, by phone or app?
For catering, call (319) 221-1040 directly. Phone ordering lets us confirm quantities, timing, and pickup for large orders. Smaller catering orders can also be placed for delivery through DoorDash, Uber Eats, or Grubhub.

### Can catering be delivered?
Smaller catering orders can be delivered through DoorDash, Uber Eats, and Grubhub, subject to each app's size limits and fees. For the largest fish family deals and pans, pickup at 1616 1st Ave NE is the most reliable option, and calling ahead ensures it's ready and fresh.

### Do you offer pans for parties?
Yes. Our nugget pans and fish family deals are made for feeding groups, and party wings can be added by the batch. Call (319) 221-1040 to combine pans, wings, and sides into one catering order sized to your party.

### What are good quick lunch options?
For a fast lunch, try a two-item combo, a basket of chicken tenders, a 4-piece whole wings meal, or a single catfish fillet with a side. All are fried fresh to order and easy to eat on a break. Call (319) 221-1040 to order ahead.

### How do I order lunch ahead so it's ready fast?
Call (319) 221-1040 and place your order before you head over. Since everything is fried fresh to order, a call ahead means your lunch is hot and bagged when you arrive at 1616 1st Ave NE, so you're not waiting on a short break.

### Can I get lunch delivered to my workplace?
Yes. Order through DoorDash, Uber Eats, or Grubhub by searching Captains Fish and Chicken in the app, and have lunch delivered to your office or job site. Each app sets its own delivery times and fees.

### Do you have lunch portions for one person?
Yes. Combos, tender baskets, and single fillets are sized for one, so you can grab exactly what you need without a big order. Call (319) 221-1040 if you'd like a recommendation.

### Are you open for lunch?
We serve fresh takeout throughout the day. Hours can vary, so please call (319) 221-1040 to confirm current hours before you head over for lunch.

### What's on the seafood feast?
Our seafood lineup features jumbo shrimp, a shrimp basket, crab cakes, fresh red snapper, and cod, all fried fresh to order. Mix and match to build the feast you want, and add sides to round out the plate. Call (319) 221-1040 if you'd like help putting it together.

### How much seafood should I order to feed a group?
For a shared seafood feast, plan on a mix such as a shrimp basket plus a couple of crab cakes and a red snapper for two to three people, scaling up from there. Tell us your headcount at (319) 221-1040 and we'll help you size the order.

### How do I order a seafood feast for pickup?
Call (319) 221-1040 and order ahead so the kitchen can time your seafood to your arrival. Because everything is fried fresh to order, calling ahead means it's hot and crispy when you pick up at 1616 1st Ave NE.

### Can I get seafood delivered?
Yes. We deliver through DoorDash, Uber Eats, and Grubhub. Search Captains Fish and Chicken in your preferred app to order. Delivery times and fees are set by each app.

### Should I call ahead for a large seafood order?
Yes. For a bigger seafood feast, calling (319) 221-1040 ahead lets us prep everything fresh and have it ready at your pickup time instead of making you wait during a rush.

### What are Captains Fish and Chicken's hours?
Mon–Thu 11am–10pm · Fri–Sat 11am–11pm · Sun 11am–8pm (please call to confirm)
